title: Garlicky Velvety Portuguese Mozzarella Wrap
description: A Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring mozzarella balls wrapped in leafy greens and steamed to perfection, infused with a garlicky flavor.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and blanch the collard green leaves for 30 seconds to make them pliable.
Shock the blanched leaves in an ice bath to stop the cooking process.
In a small bowl, mix together the minced garlic and olive oil.
Lay a collard green leaf flat and place a mozzarella ball in the center of the leaf.
Brush the garlic and olive oil mixture onto the mozzarella ball.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Fold the stem end of the leaf over the mozzarella, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder.
Repeat the process with the remaining leaves and mozzarella balls.
Place the wraps in a steamer basket and steam for 5 minutes.
Serve the wraps hot with a squeeze of lemon juice and a sprinkle of chopped parsley if desired.
